title: NeoAuth
body:
Neo Auth is a NeoForge version of the [Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me) mod by [Axieum](https://modrinth.com/user/axieum). ### About **To quote the original mod:**
`A Minecraft mod that brings account authentication into the game in the efforts of overcoming the infamous session validation error when connecting to a server.` NeoAuth is built specifically for the [NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/) mod loader, unlike the original Fabric-based Auth Me. While retaining nearly all functionality of Auth Me, it excludes offline authentication in this NeoForge version. Like Auth Me, NeoAuth is a **client-side** only mod.
